title: French man charged with locking son in van for more than a year
summary_full: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.
summary_public: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.
